description: A plain candid press/event photograph (no on-image text or graphic design) taken inside the Oval Office. President Donald Trump (left), with characteristic blond hair and wearing a dark navy suit with a red tie, stands at a lectern bearing the round Seal of the President of the United States and shakes hands with a younger bearded man in a dark navy suit and red tie (DHS Secretary Mullin, per the tweet attribution to @SecMullinDHS), who gestures while speaking. Behind them are a cluster of military/agency flags with battle streamers and a framed oil portrait of a former official on patterned wallpaper, with ornate gold molding at right. The image is a documentary photo, not a designed meme/poster; its only 'message' comes from the accompanying tweet quoting the Secretary on protecting 'everybody' regardless of red or blue state. Marked is_designed=false: routine candid photo with no graphic-design or meme treatment.
